caption: A woman with dark hair and glasses stands against a plain dark background. She is wearing a light green tunic with floral embroidery around the neckline and a dark necklace. A small clip-on microphone is attached to her clothing. In the lower-left and lower-center areas of the frames, a logo with the text "NPTEL" is visible. Throughout the sequence, the woman is speaking and gesturing with her hands to emphasize her points. Initially, her hands are resting or slightly raised, but she progressively moves them outward and upward in an expressive manner. Her facial expressions shift from a neutral speaking pose to a more open mouth as she articulates her words. The lighting remains consistent, focusing on the woman while the background remains a void of dark gray or black.
